summary: Full-stack developer with 4+ years of experience building scalable web applications. Proficient in React, Node.js, and cloud technologies. Passionate about creating intuitive user interfaces and robust backend systems.

experience.title: Senior Frontend Engineer
bullets: Developed and maintained React-based dashboard serving 10,000+ daily active users
Implemented state management using Redux Toolkit, reducing page load times by 40%
Led migration from class components to React Hooks across 50+ component files
Collaborated with design team to create a responsive component library using Storybook
Mentored 3 junior developers through code reviews and pair programming sessions

experience.title: Full-Stack Developer
bullets: Built RESTful APIs using Node.js and Express, serving 50,000+ requests per day
Designed and implemented PostgreSQL database schemas for multi-tenant SaaS platform
Integrated third-party payment gateways (Stripe, Razorpay) processing $2M+ in transactions
Developed automated CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions and Docker
Reduced API response times by 60% through query optimization and caching strategies

experience.title: Junior Developer
bullets: Contributed to React Native mobile app with 50K+ downloads on Play Store
Wrote unit and integration tests using Jest, achieving 85% code coverage
Participated in agile sprints and daily stand-ups as part of a 8-person engineering team

projects.name: Open Source Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: An open-source real-time analytics dashboard built with React and D3.js

projects.name: E-Commerce Platform
projects.description: Full-stack e-commerce platform with cart, checkout, and inventory management
